The '''SV-50 Swift-Strike Speeder''', more commonly known as the '''Venaari Strike Speeder''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle manufactured by [[Venaari Enterprises]].

==Characteristics==
The Venaari Strike Speeder was very versatile and considered to be a reliable attack craft. It was primarily used for the transport of strike squads and had room for a strike squad of ten men. The speeder had enough firepower to defend itself in battle.

==History==
The speeder was used extensively by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on [[Venaari]] and elsewhere on Imperial-held planets in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] after the death of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

Venaari strike speeders were used in the battle against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], but splinter groups within the [[Imperial Remnant]] would also use it against each other in their internal struggles for power.

==Appearances==
